title: 12th Pass Jobs 2026 – Gram Panchayat Secretary
shortInfo: District Panchayat Kanker Recruitment 2026 for 27 posts of Gram Panchayat Secretary. Candidates with Diploma,12th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District Panchayat Kanker official website.

basic_details.job_title: District Panchayat Kanker Gram Panchayat Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 27 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Panchayat Kanker Recruitment 2026 for 27 posts of Gram Panchayat Secretary. Candidates with Diploma,12th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District Panchayat Kanker official website.

application_fee.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per state government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Ex-Servicemen/Women

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the District Panchayat Kanker Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary (10+2), One year diploma in Data Entry Operator/Programming from recognized institute
qualification.details: Higher Secondary (10+2) and one year diploma in Data Entry Operator/Programming from recognized institute.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kanker.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post is 09-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Higher Secondary (10+2) and possess a one-year diploma in Data Entry Operator/Programming from a recognized institute to be eligible.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Gram Panchayat Secretary position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per state government rules.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 27 vacancies for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post announced by the District Panchayat Kanker.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Gram Panchayat Secretary role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 3500 to Rs. 10000 Per Month, with a grade pay of Rs. 1100.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes merit based on Higher Secondary marks (50%), higher qualification (max 10 marks), a Computer Skill Test (25%), and experience as Rozgar Sahayak (15 marks).

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Panchayat Kanker, which is www.kanker.gov.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Gram Panchayat Secretary position is a contractual job offered by the District Panchayat Kanker.
